name: PaymentExtension
description: Customer cannot afford to pay their bill on time and needs help — they may be requesting a payment extension, setting up a payment plan, arranging a promise to pay, or reporting a change in financial circumstances. The customer is not ready to make a payment and needs more time or an alternative arrangement.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I need a payment extension
Can I get more time to pay my bill?
I can't afford to pay my {paymentType} this month
How do I set up a payment plan?
I'm struggling to make my payment
Can I delay my payment until next week?
I need to arrange a promise to pay
I've had a {hardshipReason} and can't pay my bill on time
Is there any way I can get a payment extension?
I won't be able to pay on time this month
I'm having financial difficulties and need help with my bill
Can I spread my {paymentType} over a few months?
My {hardshipReason} means I can't pay the full amount right now
I need a few extra days to pay
What are my options if I can't pay my bill?
Can you extend the deadline for my {paymentType} ?
I'm worried about paying my bill this month
I've never missed a payment before but I'm going to this month
What happens if I can't pay on time?
Please don't cut off my services — I just need more time to pay
I can pay some of it now but not all — can we arrange something?
payment extension
